title: Statistics
subtitle: See how your eating changes over time
offline: You’re offline. Some stats may be unavailable or outdated.

offlineEmpty.title: You're offline
offlineEmpty.desc: No local stats data available. Reconnect to load your history.

empty.title: No stats yet
empty.desc: Log a few meals to reveal calorie and macro trends here.
empty.foot: A few logs unlock your first trend.

emptyRange.title: No entries in this range
emptyRange.desc: Try another range or keep logging to compare later.
emptyRange.foot: Switch ranges to restore the trend.

limitedHistory.title: Unlock longer-term trends
limitedHistory.body: See how habits look after {{days}}+ days.

limitedWindowTitle: Access to older data requires Premium
limitedWindowDesc: Range was limited to the last {{d}} days.
